Cornerstone Tools CLI

  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Run 'cornerstone [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Cornerstone Tools CLI

Usage: cornerstone [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  schema-gen    Generate JSON Schemas for types

Run 'cornerstone [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Generate JSON Schemas for types

Usage: cornerstone schema-gen [options]

Options:
  -o|--output <OUTPUT_PATH>       The output directory for generated schemas
  -a|--assembly <ASSEMBLY_PATHS>  Paths to .NET assemblies containing types (can
                                  be specified multiple times)
  -r|--required <REQUIRED_MODE>   Schema required mode (Default, Always,
                                  DisallowNull, AllowNull)
                                  Default value is: Default.
  -c|--cache <CACHE_PATH>         Path to cache file to store type hashes
                                  (optional, disables caching if not specified)
  -f|--force                      Force regeneration of all schemas, ignoring
                                  cache
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information.

Generate JSON Schemas for types

Usage: cornerstone schema-gen [options]

Options:
  -o|--output <OUTPUT_PATH>       The output directory for generated schemas
  -a|--assembly <ASSEMBLY_PATHS>  Paths to .NET assemblies containing types (can
                                  be specified multiple times)
  -r|--required <REQUIRED_MODE>   Schema required mode (Default, Always,
                                  DisallowNull, AllowNull)
                                  Default value is: Default.
  -c|--cache <CACHE_PATH>         Path to cache file to store type hashes
                                  (optional, disables caching if not specified)
  -f|--force                      Force regeneration of all schemas, ignoring
                                  cache
  -?|-h|--help                    Show help information.
